message:
🐛 Fix demo mode switching showing stale live data (#755)

When switching from live→demo mode, cards were continuing to show
live data instead of demo data due to a race condition where in-flight
fetches completed after the mode change.

Root cause: isDemoMode() was checked at the START of async fetches,
so fetches in-flight during a mode switch would write stale live data
after the mode changed to demo.

Fix: Added modeVersion tracking to UnifiedDemo context to detect and
discard stale data:
- modeVersion increments on each mode switch
- useUnifiedData tracks which version data was captured in
- Data captured before mode switch is discarded
- Skeleton shown during mode transition

Files changed:
- UnifiedDemo.tsx: Add modeVersion state, modify useUnifiedData hook
- UnifiedDemoContext.ts: Add useModeVersion hook, default context value
- types.ts: Add modeVersion to UnifiedDemoContextValue interface

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
